summary: Frontend copy verification testing for SEO rewrite. Most homepage and ExecutiveCoaching copy renders correctly. However, several pages (OrganizationalAdvisory, TeamFacilitation, MeditationRetreat, Method) don't render the new description headlines from en.js because those components don't reference t.services.* translations for the description block.

integration_issues.issue: 'Your Organisation Has a Nervous System, Too' headline NOT rendering - OrganizationalAdvisory.jsx doesn't use t.services.organizationalAdvisory.description.headline. Only t.home.testimonials is referenced.
'Most Team Problems Aren't Actually Team Problems' headline NOT rendering - TeamFacilitation.jsx doesn't use t.services.teamFacilitation.description.headline.
'The Space Your Real Questions Have Been Waiting For' headline NOT rendering - MeditationRetreat.jsx doesn't use t.services.meditationRetreats.description.headline.
'Most Leadership Development Doesn't Go Deep Enough' NOT rendering - Method.jsx uses m.whatWeDo not m.intro which contains this headline.

FOUND: Homepage: 'The Work That Changes How You Lead — From the Inside Out' (tagline)
Homepage: 'This Is Where It Begins' (CTA section)
Homepage: 'An Advisor Who Works Where Most Never Go' (About Preview)
Homepage: 'One Direction. Four Ways to Begin.' (services section)
Method page: 'What Becomes Possible When the Work Goes Deep' (benefits section)
ExecutiveCoaching: 'A Container for the Work That Actually Matters' (description)
ExecutiveCoaching: 'You've Outgrown Standard Coaching' (for whom section)
Work With Me: 'Four Ways We Can Work Together'
About page: 'Two Decades. One Direction.' (UNCHANGED - confirmed)
MISSING_FROM_PAGE: Method page: 'Most Leadership Development Doesn't Go Deep Enough' (exists in en.js t.method.intro.headline but Method.jsx doesn't render m.intro)
OrgAdvisory: 'Your Organisation Has a Nervous System, Too' (exists in en.js but component uses hardcoded data)
TeamFacilitation: 'Most Team Problems Aren't Actually Team Problems' (exists in en.js but component uses hardcoded data)
ExecutiveRetreats: 'The Space Your Real Questions Have Been Waiting For' (exists in en.js but component uses hardcoded data)

action_items: OrganizationalAdvisory.jsx: Add a description section that renders t.services.organizationalAdvisory.description (overline, headline, body) - similar to how ExecutiveCoaching.jsx renders its description section
TeamFacilitation.jsx: Add a description section rendering t.services.teamFacilitation.description
MeditationRetreat.jsx: Add a description section rendering t.services.meditationRetreats.description
Method.jsx: Render m.intro section (overline + 'Most Leadership Development Doesn't Go Deep Enough' headline + body) - likely add a new section before the methods cards
critical_code_review_comments: The description.headline fields in en.js for OrganizationalAdvisory, TeamFacilitation, MeditationRetreat services are updated in translations but the corresponding JSX components don't reference t.services.* at all - they use hardcoded constants. New description sections need to be added to these 3 pages.
Method.jsx has m.intro defined in en.js (lines 230-234) but Method.jsx never renders m.intro - only m.whatWeDo, m.benefits, m.accordion, m.narm, m.integral, m.combined are rendered.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (9/14 copy items verified, 4 missing from rendered pages)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test the 4 missing headlines after main agent adds description sections to OrganizationalAdvisory.jsx, TeamFacilitation.jsx, MeditationRetreat.jsx, and adds m.intro rendering in Method.jsx. Use test_copy.py as a baseline. All other homepage and ExecutiveCoaching copy verified working. About page confirmed unchanged.
